audience: AI engineering recruiters, startup founders, and cross-border e-commerce operators

title.zh: 我如何把跨境电商 AI 助手从 Demo 做成可私有部署的运营系统
title.en: Turning an AI Commerce Demo into a Private Deployable Operations System

hook.zh: 真正能落地的 AI 工具，不是一个 Chatbot，而是一套带审批、证据和安全边界的运营系统。
hook.en: A usable AI business tool is not just a chatbot. It needs approvals, evidence, and clear safety boundaries.

platforms.name: bilibili
platforms.title: 跨境电商 AI 助手：从 Demo 到私有部署系统
platforms.description: 拆解一个 AI Commerce Copilot 项目：选品评分、供应商询价、内容草稿、人工审批、审计证据和本地私有部署。

platforms.title: 我做了一个跨境电商 AI 运营助手
platforms.description: 不是玩具 Demo，而是围绕运营决策、审批、安全边界和私有部署设计的 AI 系统。

platforms.name: linkedin
platforms.title: From AI Demo to Deployable Operations System
platforms.description: A practical breakdown of building an AI commerce copilot with product scoring, supplier quote workflows, approval gates, audit evidence, and private deployment.

safety_review.notes: Review before publishing. Do not show real seller data, credentials, cookies, private platform screens, or claims of official Temu partnership/live account automation.
